message:
refactor(runtime): simplify ok_or_else error returns in CancellationRuntime

Remove unnecessary Ok() wrapping around .ok_or_else() calls in
register_task, request_cancel, start_drain, complete_drain, and
related methods. Since ok_or_else already returns Result, the
trailing ? operator and Ok() wrapper were redundant — returning
the Result directly is cleaner.

Also reformats the error construction closures to use multi-line
struct literal style for consistency with the project's formatting
conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
